HGSS.377.0018: I’m on patrol for suspicious individuals.
HGSS.377.0021: Irene: I’ll tell my sister about you!\f
HGSS.377.0022: Irene: I’ll tell my sister about you!
HGSS.377.0023:
Irene: How did you find this place?\r
This is our hideout!
HGSS.377.0024:
Jenn: What the...?
What are you doing?\f
HGSS.377.0026:
Jenn: Better not laugh yet.
My sister is really strong!
HGSS.377.0027:
Jenn: You and us... We might as well
become friends!
HGSS.377.0028:
Kate: I must pay you back for taking
care of my sisters!\f
HGSS.377.0030:
Kate: You are so strong.
We lost with no excuses...\f
Here, take this!\f
HGSS.377.0032:
Kate: I’m sorry we jumped you.\f
We never expected anyone to find 
us here.\r
You sure startled us.
HGSS.377.0034:
Trainer Tips\f
North to Goldenrod City
The Radio Tower at Goldenrod is giving\r
away Radio Cards.\f
Answer their questions and receive a
Radio Card!
HGSS.377.0035:
Pokémon Day Care
Let us raise your Pokémon for you!
HGSS.377.0037:
Lyra: Good work, Grandpa!
The Pokémon you raised for me has\r
been as healthy as can be!\f
You look fit, too!\f
HGSS.377.0039:
Let me introduce you.
This is [0103,0000,0000]. He’s a Trainer.\f
He seems to be getting better at
raising Pokémon.\f
Well, not as good as you, Grandpa,
of course!\f
HGSS.377.0042:
Ethan: Good work, Grandpa!
The Pokémon you raised for me has\r
been as healthy as can be!\f
You look fit, too!\f
HGSS.377.0044:
Let me introduce you.
This is [0103,0000,0000]. She’s a Trainer.\f
She seems to be getting better at
raising Pokémon.\f
Well, not as good as you, Grandpa,
of course!\f
HGSS.377.0046:
I have an idea!
I’ll give you our numbers.\f
Then you can check on the Pokémon
we raise for you.\f
HGSS.377.0047:
[0103,0000,0000] registered the
Day-Care Man in the Pokégear!
HGSS.377.0048:
[0103,0000,0000] registered the
Day-Care Lady in the Pokégear!
HGSS.377.0049:
Call us from time to time when you
give us your Pokémon to raise.\f
I’ll be happy to have a use for this
Pokégear my grandchild gave me.\f
